query: DELETE FROM protocol_assignments WHERE patientId IN (SELECT id FROM patients WHERE firstName = 'Test' AND lastName = 'User'); DELETE FROM protocol_assignments WHERE protocolId IN (SELECT id FROM protocols WHERE name LIKE 'Test %' OR name LIKE 'Restore Test %');
